codeReview.summary: The recommendations document comprehensively fulfills all assertions (VAL-APP-003, VAL-CROSS-001, VAL-CROSS-002). It provides 17 specific, prioritized improvement recommendations across all 4 mapj_cli skills with concrete implementation examples, source citations, and an actionable implementation plan. The document demonstrates thorough analysis of the skill evaluation findings and translates them into specific, actionable improvements.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skills are located in `skills/` directory at repository root, NOT in `.factory/skills/`. The worker discovered this via Glob search after the Read from `.factory/skills/` failed. This location should be documented in AGENTS.md or architecture.md.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows: worker first tried to read from '.factory/skills/mapj/SKILL.md' which failed, then used Glob to find actual location at 'skills/mapj/SKILL.md'

summary: PASS - The recommendations document is comprehensive and well-structured. It provides 17 specific recommendations organized by skill and priority, with full implementation examples including code snippets, before/after diffs, and checklists. Each recommendation cites its source (Anthropic, arXiv, Microsoft, Agent Skills Standard). The document includes an impact estimation showing improvement from 71.5/100 average to ~90/100, and a 3-phase implementation plan with time estimates. All assertions are fully satisfied.
